items.title_en: The incredible chip sector rally is leaving behind its most notable stock. What's wrong with Nvidia?

items.title_en: Snap issues cautious guidance as Perplexity deal ends, Middle East 'geopolitical situation' causes uncertainty
items.title_zh: 随着 Perplexity 交易结束，Snap 发布谨慎指引，中东“地缘政治局势”带来不确定性
items.desc_en: Snap reported first-quarter earnings and provided cautious sales guidance while revealing it no longer has a deal with the generative AI startup Perplexity.
items.desc_zh: Snap 公布了第一季度财报，并提供了谨慎的销售指引，同时透露其不再与生成人工智能初创公司 Perplexity 达成交易。

items.title_en: Former OpenAI board member says Elon Musk offered her sperm donations

items.desc_zh: Shivon Zilis 是马斯克四个孩子的母亲。这种关系始于她为 OpenAI 提供建议时。

items.title_en: Iran war threatens jet fuel shortage that could disrupt summer travel in Asia and Europe
